buttons.primary: bg-white text-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-200 font-semibold rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 font-medium rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm border border-zinc-700

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-700 rounded-sm

charts_and_viz.amplification_network: Force Directed Graph (Nodes = Users, Edges = Retweets)

universal_guidelines: Always use 'dark' class on the html element or body.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid Zinc-950 + subtle noise or grid lines.
Text contrast is critical. Headings must be White or Zinc-100.
Interactive elements must have a :hover state that is distinct.
Use Lucide-React icons. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance.
No rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Use rounded-sm or rounded-md for a 'tactical' look.
Animation: Use Framer Motion for entrance animations (fade-in, slide-up). Stagger children.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Barlow Condensed (Headings), Inter (Body), JetBrains Mono (Code).
Create a Layout wrapper that enforces the Dark Mode and Sidebar structure.
For the 'Narrative Risk Index', create a custom component using Recharts RadialBar.
Use the 'grid_lines' class in the visual_enhancers section for the Dashboard background.
Layer 1 (Official) should look like a document scanner/analyzer.
Layer 2 (Public) should look like a social media feed + analytics center.
Layer 3 (Resilience) should look like a high-level strategic map.
